---
description: "Simple Markdown comparison tool."
applyTo: "**"
---

# Rules

## General rules
- Leave terse comments in the code to help me learn.

## Linting
- Lint all changes

## Code style
- Use `const` and `let`, never `var`.
- Use ES6+ syntax where possible.
- Avoid global variables.
- Use descriptive variable and function names.
- Keep functions small and focused; avoid deep nesting.
- Add comments only to explain non-obvious or complex logic.
